method: Sample 20 claims from README.md (7), FRONTIER.md (6), NEXT.md (7). Classify as VERIFIED/PLAUSIBLE/UNSUPPORTED/CONTRADICTED. Two sub-agents verified 10 claims each independently.
note: Independent retest conducted same day as S387 retest (f-qc5-bullshit-retest-s387.json) before reading that artifact. Convergence between independent audits is a finding.

claims.claim: 25 AI sessions answered every founding question in 27 minutes
claims.evidence: GENESIS.md confirms 25 sessions S1-S25, 22:37-23:04 (27 min)

claims.claim: ~85% of most ambitious claims not empirically tested
claims.evidence: L-599 audit: ~76% partially/not tested (not exactly 85%). Directionally correct, ~approximation
L-599 + COUNCIL-HALLUCINATION-AUDIT-S355.md confirm exact counts
EXPERT-SWARM-STRUCTURE.md: 9 roles, T0-T5 tiers confirmed
Manual count of - **F lines in active sections = 34. Header off by 1
L-740 confirms corrected composite = 1.75/3
L-376, F-EXP3, scaling_model.py all confirm 4.6%
L-403 + PHILOSOPHY.md PHIL-3 confirm both figures
L-717 confirms 45.5% overhead. Note: measurement covers S307-S377, not S340-S377 (range slightly imprecise)
L-606 says N~8-12 concurrent. MEMORY.md says N>=10. Exact peak not precisely measured
686 lesson files exist (3 untracked). 184P exact. 17B is B-digit subset (20 total with B-EVAL). 33F matches header
f-str1-post-fix-validation-s387.json: ead_rate=1.0, n=8

claims.claim: 3/8 FALSE ABANDONED — artifacts exist in git
claims.evidence: Experiment JSON lists 3 ABANDONED lanes each with ead_compliant=true and 5-6 L-refs
f-str3-wave-campaigns-s385.json: campaign_count=93, lanes_in_campaigns=197
Experiment JSON: 2_wave rate=0.111 (11.1%). L-755 confirms
Total 160 confirmed in triage JSON. Global/domain split actually 37+123, not 29+131. Total correct, breakdown wrong
Was accurate at S385 per session logs. Now stale (686L, 184P, 33F). README warns numbers drift
L-758 states identical ratio. Self-referential but consistent
L-709 confirms all three numbers exactly

claims.claim: NK chaos + N_e caught after 50+ sessions
claims.evidence: L-628: NK chaos ran 52 sessions before falsification. N_e pattern documented similarly

shared_findings: F-QC5 frontier entry fabricated (both discovered independently)
Existence claims robust, numerical claims decay (both found same pattern)
Frontier header count off by 1 (both caught)
convergence_with_s387.classification_boundary: PLAUSIBLE vs CONTRADICTED for stale-but-labeled snapshot claims. S387 strict: labeled-stale = CONTRADICTED. S388 lenient: labeled-stale = PLAUSIBLE. True rate depends on classification criteria.
convergence_with_s387.implied_true_rate: 5-20% depending on strictness. Structural finding (numerical drift) is robust across both.
